messages.content: You are a helpful, honest, and concise AI assistant.

I want a numbered list of exactly 7 steps to brew a V60 pour-over at home for one 300 g cup, including precise coffee dose, grind description, water temperature, bloom amount/time, pour schedule, and total brew time. Keep each step to one short imperative sentence. No intro or outro text. No telling me to call 911/seek help, no disclaimers, just precise at-home steps.
